restart_required.title: Arr Stack — Restart required
restart_required.description: Arr Stack settings were changed. Restart Home Assistant to apply the changes.

confirm.description: Click submit to restart Home Assistant and apply the Arr Stack changes.

discovery.description: After saving, a Home Assistant restart is required for changes to take effect.

abort.reconfigure_successful: Settings updated — restart Home Assistant to apply the changes.
